debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
state : SystemState
reqType : BasicRequest
tId : ThreadId
prelimReq : Request := ⋯
previous : List Request := ⋯
removed : List Request := ⋯
occurrences : List Nat := ⋯
req : Request := ⋯
pairedRequest? : Option Request := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
orderConstraints' : OrderConstraints := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts:
by
       intro id h
       cases pairedRequest?
       case none =>
         apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_mem_reqIds
         exact state.removedCoherent id h
       case some =>
         apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_mem_reqIds
         apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_mem_reqIds
         exact state.removedCoherent id h }
  return (st, req.id)
λ id h => by cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests'] <;> apply state.removedCoherent id h }
λ id h => by cases pairedRequest? <;> (simp [requests']; repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem; exact state.removedCoherent id h)
by intro id h; simp [requests']; cases pairedRequest? <;> (repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert); exact state.removedCoherent id h
fun id h => by cases pairedRequest? <;> repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem; exact state.removedCoherent id h
λ id h => by cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests', state.removedCoherent id h]
by intros id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> (simp [requests']; repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem; exact state.removedCoherent id h)
by intro id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem; exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intro id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem; exact state.removedCoherent id h
λ id h => by cases pairedRequest? <;> repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem; exact state.removedCoherent id h

by
       intro id h
       have hne : id ≠ req.id := by
         match hm : (state.removed.map Request.id ++ reqIds state.requests).max? with
         | none => cases List.max?_eq_none.1 hm (List.mem_append_left _ h)
         | some m =>
           have hle := List.le_max? (List.mem_append_left _ h)
           simp [freshId, hm] at hle; exact Nat.ne_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_of_le hle)
       simp [requests', reqIds]; split <;> intro h' <;> repeat (cases h' with | _ => ?) <;>
         (first | exact hne ‹_› | exact state.removedCoherent id h ‹_› | (subst_vars; apply state.removedCoherent id h; apply List.mem_map_of_mem; assumption)) }
  return (st, req.id)
by intros id h; simp [requests']; split <;> repeat (apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert); apply state.removedCoherent; assumption
λ id h => by cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests', state.removedCoherent id h]

by
       intro id h
       have h_old := state.removedCoherent id h
       cases pairedRequest?
       · simp [requests']; exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_old
       · simp [requests']; exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_old)
   }
  return (st, req.id)
by intro id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests', state.removedCoherent id h, RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert]
by intro id h; simp [requests']; split <;> (repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_mem_reqIds_insert); exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intro id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> (repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_mem_reqIds) <;> exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intro id h; simp [requests']; cases pairedRequest? <;> repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_of_mem_reqIds <;> exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intro id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests', RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert, state.removedCoherent id h]
by intros id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests'] <;> repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem; exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intro id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> (simp [requests']; repeat (apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem); exact state.removedCoherent id h)
by intros id h; have := state.removedCoherent id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests', RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert, *]

by
       intro id h
       have h_old := state.removedCoherent id h
       simp [requests']
       split <;> (repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem)
       exact h_old }
  return (st, req.id)

by
       intros id h
       cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests'] <;> repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert_of_mem
       exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intro id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> (repeat apply RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert); exact state.removedCoherent id h
by intros id h; cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests'] <;> (repeat apply RequestArray.id_mem_insert_of_mem) <;> exact state.removedCoherent id h
λ id h => by cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests', RequestArray.mem_reqIds_insert, state.removedCoherent id h]
